description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 7th; Slot none; Price 600 gp; Weight — DESCRIPTION This small token is a thumb-sized cylinder of unbreakable greenish glass. A transport token allows the bearer to use the transport function of a local dungeon. The bearer can teleport to a level only if she knows and speaks its identifying rune. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells dimension door; Special a small shard chipped from the associated dungeon; Cost 300 gp
